description: Screenshot-style graphic reproducing a Truth Social or X post from Donald J. Trump (@realDonaldTrump). White background with a circular profile avatar in the top-left showing Trump's face stylized as a U.S. flag (blue stars over one eye, red-and-white stripes across the face). Next to it is the bold black 'Donald J. Trump' display name with a pink or magenta verified checkmark badge and a dark square 'Truth Social' app icon, then the grey '@realDonaldTrump' handle beneath. The post body is set in large black sans-serif text reading verbatim: 'How much abuse can the Republican Senate take from the Radical Left Lunatics in the form of Democrat Senators, before they BLOW UP (TERMINATE!) THE FILIBUSTER, and approve things at a record clip, including The Save America Act, that would be unthinkable without the Filibuster Termination??? The Dems will do it on the first hour of their first day. DO NOT BE STUPID!!! President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: How much abuse can the Republican Senate take from the Radical Left Lunatics... before they BLOW UP (TERMINATE!) THE FILIBUSTER... DO NOT BE STUPID!!! President DONALD J. TRUMP
